title: pelargonium angulosum
intro: Pelargonium angulosum is a species of succulent plant, also known as the stately pelargonium or angled geranium, belonging to the family Geraniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, attributed to its content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Pelargonium angulosum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as coughs and sore throats, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Pelargonium angulosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to soothe throat irritations and promote overall well-being.
